name: Vietnamese Lemongrass Marinade
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut off the top 2/3 of each lemongrass stalk, trim off the outside leaves and roots, and slice the core thinly.
2. Purée the lemongrass, garlic, shallots, chilies, and brown sugar to a fine paste. Work in the fish sauce, lime juice, and hot sauce.
3. Marinate fish or thinly sliced poultry or beef for 1-2 hours, turning once or twice.
4. Makes enough for 1 1/2-2 pounds seafood, poultry, or meat.
